D 67

EL ALACRAN MEXICAN FOOD

This grade is calculated by us from Florida DBPR public inspection records — Florida does not issue official grades. How we calculate it →

Data last updated: June 4, 2026

D grade · 67/100 · safer than 7% of Orange County restaurants we grade

Is EL ALACRAN MEXICAN FOOD clean? No — a D, 67/100, at its most recent inspection on June 4, 2026. That visit logged 2 high-priority, 3 intermediate, and 8 basic violations.

Inspectors cited 2 high-priority, 3 intermediate, and 8 basic violations. That leaves it safer than 7% of Orange County restaurants we grade. On the upside, the trend has been improving. Safer, higher-graded options nearby are listed below.

Get directions Call (407) 395-9750

Safer options nearby

Higher-graded restaurants close to EL ALACRAN MEXICAN FOOD, by Florida DBPR grade:

    WINTER GARDEN BOWL

    4★ 0.1 mi away

  • A

    3.8★ 0.3 mi away

    WENDY'S #11721

    3.7★ 0.3 mi away

Inspection history

The following records are from Florida DBPR public inspection records, most recent first.

  1. June 4, 2026 · Routine - Food

    Inspection Completed - No Further Action

    2 high-priority · 3 intermediate · 8 basic

    • 08 — Cross-contamination: raw foods separated; food protected during prep/storage (×2)
    • 11 — Employee health knowledge; no ill/symptomatic employee present
    • 14 — Food-contact & nonfood-contact surfaces properly designed/maintained (×2)
    • 21 — Wiping cloths; clean & soiled linens; laundry
    • 22 — Food-contact surfaces clean and sanitized (×2)
    • 23 — Nonfood-contact surfaces clean
    • 29 — Plumbing installed & maintained; mop sink; backflow prevention
    • 31 — Handwash sinks accessible; handwashing supplies & sign provided (×2)
    • 32 — Bathrooms

  2. October 28, 2025 · Routine - Food

    Inspection Completed - No Further Action

    3 high-priority · 2 intermediate · 12 basic

    • 01 — Food from approved source; safe, unadulterated, sound condition
    • 03 — Temperature control of foods (cold/hot holding, cooking, cooling, reheating) (×2)
    • 08 — Cross-contamination: raw foods separated; food protected during prep/storage
    • 14 — Food-contact & nonfood-contact surfaces properly designed/maintained (×2)
    • 21 — Wiping cloths; clean & soiled linens; laundry
    • 22 — Food-contact surfaces clean and sanitized (×3)
    • 23 — Nonfood-contact surfaces clean
    • 24 — Storage & handling of clean equipment and utensils; air drying (×2)
    • 29 — Plumbing installed & maintained; mop sink; backflow prevention
    • 36 — Floors, walls, ceilings clean & maintained; proper ventilation (×2)
    • 40 — Employee personal belongings
